languages.text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

traits.locale_text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

languages.text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.
languages.original_text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

traits.locale_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening them must be found.
The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening them must be found.
The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.
The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

languages.text: Da die Tore des Palastes versiegelt sind, kann Juvenna nicht mit aller Macht vorgehen. Jemand muss die Litanei des Tors lernen oder es auf anderem Weg öffnen.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

traits.locale_text: Da die Tore des Palastes versiegelt sind, kann Juvenna nicht mit aller Macht vorgehen. Jemand muss die Litanei des Tors lernen oder es auf anderem Weg öffnen.

languages.text: Les portes du palais sont fermées, ce qui empêche Juvenna d'employer la force. Il faut découvrir la litanie de la porte ou un autre moyen de l'ouvrir.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

traits.locale_text: Les portes du palais sont fermées, ce qui empêche Juvenna d'employer la force. Il faut découvrir la litanie de la porte ou un autre moyen de l'ouvrir.

languages.text: 宫殿大门被封锁，尤文娜也就无法展开决定性的攻势。必须找到开启大门的祷文，或者另想办法把门打开。
languages.original_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

traits.locale_text: 宫殿大门被封锁，尤文娜也就无法展开决定性的攻势。必须找到开启大门的祷文，或者另想办法把门打开。

languages.text: Las puertas del palacio están cerradas a cal y canto, lo cual impide que Juvenna actúe con contundencia. Es necesario averiguar la letanía de la puerta, o bien hallar cualquier otro modo de abrirla.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

traits.locale_text: Las puertas del palacio están cerradas a cal y canto, lo cual impide que Juvenna actúe con contundencia. Es necesario averiguar la letanía de la puerta, o bien hallar cualquier otro modo de abrirla.

languages.text: 宮殿の門には鍵がかかっており、ジュウェンナは決定的な行動をとることができない。異端審問官が宮殿に入ることができるように、門の儀式を学ぶか、門を開ける他の方法を見つける必要がある。
languages.original_text: The gates of the palace are locked, which means Juwenna will not be able to act decisively. It is necessary to learn the litany of the gates or find some other way to open them so that the Inquisition can enter the palace unhindered.

languages.text: Sarayın kapıları mühürlü, bu yüzden Juvenna üstün bir güçle hareket edemez. Kapının ilahisi öğrenilmeli ya da açmanın başka bir yolu bulunmalı.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are sealed, and thus Juvenna cannot act with decisive force. The gate's litany must be learned, or some other means of opening it must be found.

traits.locale_text: Sarayın kapıları mühürlü, bu yüzden Juvenna üstün bir güçle hareket edemez. Kapının ilahisi öğrenilmeli ya da açmanın başka bir yolu bulunmalı.
